user.title: Add Mitsubishi Climate Proxy
user.description: Create a hybrid entity with Dual/Single setpoint wrapper and optional vane control.

data.name: Name for the new Hybrid Entity
data.coordinator_single_target: Coordinator single-target mode (Tesla-style: one target temp, coordinator owns mode)
data.room_key: Coordinator room key (any zone key, e.g. 'primary') — required for single-target mode
data.comfort_offset: Comfort offset (°F) applied to the far band edge

init.title: Mitsubishi Climate Proxy options
init.description: Toggle the Tesla-style single-target surface for a coordinator-owned head. Changes reload the entry in place (HomeKit tile is preserved, no re-pair).

data.room_key: Coordinator room key (any zone key, e.g. 'primary')
